settings.language.title: Display language
settings.title: Settings
settings.basic.title: Basic Settings
settings.basic.autoselect.label: Auto Select
settings.basic.autoselect.description: If nothing is selected, enabling this will trigger {shortcut} first.
settings.basic.copy_result.label: Copy Result to Clipboard
settings.basic.copy_result.description: Automatically copy the polished result to your clipboard.
settings.basic.autostart.label: Launch at login
settings.basic.autostart.description: Automatically start the app when you log in.
settings.basic.shortcut.label: Global Shortcut
settings.basic.shortcut.hint: Click the button then press modifier + key combination (⌘/Ctrl, Alt, or Shift required).
settings.basic.shortcut.capturing_hint: Listening... (Press modifier + key, or Esc to cancel)
settings.basic.shortcut.error_modifier: At least one modifier key (⌘/Ctrl, Alt, or Shift) is required
settings.basic.ai_provider.label: AI Provider
settings.basic.typo.label: Typo Cloud (Default)
settings.basic.typo.description: Use our optimized cloud service. Unlimited for signed-in users.
settings.basic.logs.label: Logs
settings.default_prompt.label: Default Prompt
settings.slash_prompts.label: Slash Prompts (Max 5)
settings.slash_prompts.instruction_place: Describe what this slash command should do
settings.slash_prompts.hint: Tip: add your slash key at the start or end of the selected text (e.g. /p) to use this instruction instead of the default prompt.
settings.load_error: Failed to load settings from server
main.hero.title: Welcome to Typo
main.hero.subtitle: Your AI-powered writing companion. Refine your thoughts, polish your prose, and communicate with confidence.
main.hero.login_hint: Sign in to unlock history sync and advanced statistics.
main.error.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded. Sign in for Unlimited Access
upgrade.title: New version {version} available
upgrade.ready_to_install: A new release of Typo is ready to install.
upgrade.up_to_date: You are on the latest version (v{version})
history.title: Completion History
history.empty_desc: Your polished writing completions will appear here once you start using Typo.
history.sign_in_desc: Sign in with your Typo Cloud account to persist and access your writing history across all devices.
history.delete_confirm_desc: Are you sure you want to delete this completion from your history? This action cannot be undone.
